title: Echoes of Exploration
description: A 1.20.1 Fabric modpack with an emphasis on exploring ancient structures and building new ones
body:
A somewhat small Origins modpack focused on exploring remnants from past civilizations and building up new civilization.

This focus mods of the pack are Origins, Better Archeology, and Bewitchment, with a number of other smaller mods that enhance the experience with these mods.

(While the pack contains Iris Shaders, it does not come packed with shader packs, please install your preferred shaders manually)
